coverage_goal: Collect eventing results for every FEI member nation and every eventing level, prioritizing data.fei and supplementing with national-event sources.

coverage.notes: National-event sources use all_eventing_levels when they are intended to collect every local, regional, national, youth, young-horse, and FEI class exposed by a federation portal.

sources.name: FEI Database
sources.notes: Primary eventing source. Use before national sources whenever a result appears in the FEI database.

sources.name: All national federation results
sources.notes: Discover and connect national federation calendars and result portals for every FEI member nation and every eventing level.

sources.name: European national federation results
sources.notes: Discover and connect national federation calendars and result portals for European FEI member nations across every eventing level.

sources.name: British Eventing results
sources.notes: National-event source for UK coverage across every class level exposed by British Eventing.

sources.name: Equestrian Australia eventing results
sources.notes: National-event source for Australian coverage across every state, national, FEI, and lower-level class exposed by Equestrian Australia.

sources.name: Equestrian Sports New Zealand eventing results
sources.notes: National-event source for New Zealand coverage across every class level exposed by Equestrian Sports New Zealand.

sources.name: United States Eventing Association results
sources.notes: National-event source for USA coverage across every recognized USEA and FEI eventing level.
